title: astragalus podocarpus
intro: Astragalus podocarpus, also known as Huang Qi or Astragalus, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus podocarpus include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced stress and fatigue. It is often prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture, and can be combined with other herbs to create herbal remedies for a range of health conditions.
